  1. Description
  2. Classes and Interfaces

Package scorefour.view

package scorefour.view
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    BeadView
     
    BoardView
    BoardView initializes a fixed visual board and provides a way to draw these graphics to a Panel.
    ButtonView
    ButtonView initializes the visual aspects of a button and provides a way to draw these graphics to a Panel and edit the state of a graphic using the setIndex method.
    Frame
    A Frame creates a new JFrame where the contents of a Panel can be displayed.
    MenuView
    MenuView initializes a fixed visual overlay and provides a way to draw these graphics to a Panel.
    OverlayView
    OverlayView initializes a non-fixed visual overlay and provides a way to draw these graphics to a Panel.
    Panel
    A Panel which acts as the main rendering and input handler for a Game
    PegView
     
    PlayingView
    PlayingView initializes fixed in-game visuals and provides a way to draw these graphics to a Panel.
